description_long: This object is a classic long-barreled shotgun with a wooden full stock and fore-end, featuring a smooth, cylindrical barrel and a metallic receiver. The wood grain is visible along the stock and fore-end, giving it a traditional, robust appearance. The barrel is long and slender, with a front sight bead and a simple, unvented rib. The trigger guard is rounded and metallic, enclosing a single trigger. The receiver and barrel are finished in a dark, matte metal, contrasting with the warm brown wood. The overall design is utilitarian and functional, suitable for hunting or sporting use in an urban or rural environment.
description: A traditional long-barreled shotgun with a wooden stock and fore-end, and a dark metallic barrel and receiver. The design is classic and robust, with a rounded trigger guard and a single barrel.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the shotgun, highlighting the wooden stock, fore-end, and the long, dark barrel.
description_view_1: Top-down view emphasizing the slim profile of the barrel and the alignment of the wooden fore-end with the metal receiver.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same features as view 0, with clear visibility of the stock's grain and the barrel's length.
description_view_3: Bottom-up view showing the underside of the shotgun, including the trigger guard and the smooth transition between wood and metal components.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, no visible ribbing or venting, long smooth barrel
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized metallic guard with smooth edges and no finger grooves
